original_paper: A Turing test of whether AI chatbots are behaviorally similar to humans

original_paper: Sentiment Analysis of Text Reviews Using Lexicon-Enhanced Bert Embedding (LeBERT) Model with Convolutional Neural Network

original_paper: When Object Detection Meets Knowledge Distillation: A Survey

original_paper: Feature selection strategies: a comparative analysis of SHAP-value and importance-based methods

original_paper: Dual residual attention network for image denoising

original_paper: Deformable 3D Gaussians for High-Fidelity Monocular Dynamic Scene Reconstruction

original_paper: Driving with LLMs: Fusing Object-Level Vector Modality for Explainable Autonomous Driving
